name: Herbed Vegetable Fritatta
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Kraft Healthy Favorites Shredded reduced fat, low-moisture part-skim mozzarella cheese
1 1/2 packages Frozen cholester-free egg product, thawed (12 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray an 8-inch ovenproof skillet with non-stick cooking spray.
3. Layer the potatoes, salt, pepper, zucchini, half of the cheese, onions, and basil in the skillet.
4. Shake the egg product well and pour over the vegetables.
5. Bake for 22-25 minutes, or until set.
6. Sprinkle with the remaining half cup of cheese and tomatoes.
7. Heat the broiler.
8. Broil for 2 minutes, or until the cheese is melted.
